message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorFontColor #000000
  ParticipantBorderColor #333333
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  BoxBorderColor #333333
  BoxBackgroundColor #D9D9D9
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowFontColor #000000
  MessageAlign left
}

actor "Programador" as Prog

box "LEA" #D9D9D9
participant "front: Ceed" as Front
participant "agent: Ceed" as Agent
end box

activate Front
Front -> Front : see(addBrain, brain)
deactivate Front

activate Front
Front -> Front : see('listen', port)
deactivate Front

Prog -> Front : ws://lea
activate Front
Front -> Front : see('onSocketConnection', socket)
activate Front
deactivate Front

Front --> Prog : socket.emit(agents)

Prog -> Front : see(agent, action, args)
activate Front
Front -> Agent : see(action, args)
activate Agent
Agent --> Front
deactivate Agent
Front --> Prog : resolve()
deactivate Front

Prog -> Front : http://lea/:agent/:action
activate Front
Front -> Front : see('http', [req, res])
activate Front
Front -> Agent : see(action, [req, res])
activate Agent
Agent --> Front
deactivate Agent
Front --> Prog : res.send()
deactivate Front
deactivate Front

@enduml
